note: A profile is ONE selection that fills every contract row at once. The kernel resolves the active profile at session start and loads its rows. Selection: read .madewell/profile (a local, gitignored one-line file naming the active profile); else madewell.json 'profile'; else resolve by first contact — a human with no profile set → guide; a headless/CI/agent run → naked; a technical maintainer in a cartridge-bearing project → lead; a fresh guest clone of a cartridge-bearing project → contributor (and run the cartridge's onboarding). The quality row is 'cartridge-if-present-else-inline': use the loaded cartridge's quality skill if present, else ask the Rubric inline. Cartridges live outside the kernel install; a project loads one by explicit reference.

lead.for: the owner who holds the project — a solo maintainer + their agent, as peers
lead.memory: default (flat files: madewell.json / DECISIONS / PRODUCT / status.jsonl)

contributor.for: a technical guest folded into an existing project — a contractor / new hire + their agent
contributor.authority: surfaces findings to the Lead; stays in lane

guide.for: a non-technical builder making their own thing from scratch
guide.authority: owner — every decision is theirs; the system holds the process

naked.for: machines, CI, headless agents — no human present
